When she then remembered how he'd made sure to change his appearance again on his way out, she was really amazed at how thoroughly he took care of matters!

The queen’s insight is extraordinary as expected! If I ran into an ordinary-looking guard like this, I probably wouldn’t give him a second look either.

The Mermaid Queen quickly reacted and said, “In the end, I am still the leader of a race. Your respected self has barged into my private quarters just like this. Could it be that you have no regard for our Ocean races at all?!”

As they looked at Mojard, many Ocean race experts had strange expressions. Even though they were unhappy that the Mermaid Queen suddenly had a lover, they were still all from the Ocean races in the end. The Mermaid Queen was someone of high prestige, and yet Mojard searched willfully as they pleased without any proof. If they had been the ones who offended the monsters, wouldn’t Mojard treat them with even less importance?

Mojard chuckled when he sensed the changes in the surrounding mood. “The queen is indeed good with words. I was the one who miscalculated this time.”

The Mermaid Queen sighed in relief. “Then please leave; I won’t be seeing you out.”

Mojard’s expression froze, and he left with a snort.

The Dragon King gave the Mermaid Queen and Zu An a look. After some hesitation, he quickly caught up to Mojard to see him off.

I’ll take my time settling the debt with this guy later.

The other experts of the Ocean races talked a bit with the Mermaid Queen and used this chance to find out some information about Zu An.

The Mermaid Queen rubbed her forehead and said apologetically, “Too many things have happened today, so I need to rest.”

Everyone else was speechless. They saw her look at that guard several times as she spoke.

What rest? She's clearly going to enjoy a world of their own with that guard!

Damn this scandalous couple!

In the end, they left with strange looks on their faces.

Zu An was happy about the sudden influx of Rage points, but he was suddenly met with the Mermaid Queen’s beautiful and puzzled gaze.

“Follow me," the Mermaid Queen said, then returned to her palace first.

Zu An was hesitating when Peach turned around and beckoned toward him, gesturing for him to hurry. The Ocean race experts outside hadn’t completely left yet, so there were many things that weren't a good idea to talk about out here. In the end, he followed them inside.

…

Meanwhile, Mojard’s group returned to the Four Way Palace. After seeing off the Dragon King, his monster subordinates asked, “King, could it be that we really have to just leave the matter at that?”

“Of course not.” A glimmer of light flashed through Mojard’s eyes. “I underestimated those two too much, so that was why we lost the initiative today.”

Previously, he'd thought that as the other party was the prestigious Mermaid Queen, it was best to call over the Dragon King and the other Ocean races experts out of consideration for their reputation. He'd wanted them to serve as witnesses for her crimes, so that way, he would have a proper pretext to deal with her.

His plan was very thorough. He'd known that the queen would refute it, so that was why he'd bribed a hidden piece to capture and interrogate her maid while he confronted the Mermaid Queen. He'd thought that things were already in the bag, but how could he have known that a mysterious guard would suddenly appear? Even though the guard's appearance was plain, he was sure that this was the same person who had saved the Mermaid Queen previously.

As a result, the huge charade he'd started only limited his options instead. If he took someone as famous as the Mermaid Queen into custody without proof, that could end up pushing the Ocean races to side against the monsters. That was why he'd decisively withdrawn. It wasn’t because he was admitting defeat, but rather that he needed to wait until the Ocean races left before he paid the Mermaid Queen another visit personally.

All schemes and tricks were insignificant before an absolute disparity in strength. As long as he captured the Mermaid Queen and that guard, would he really need to be scared about proof?

…

Inside the Mermaid Queen’s chambers, the Mermaid Queen suddenly looked at the maid next to her. “Are you really that close to him?”

Her maid's smallest movements hadn’t escaped her notice. She found this really strange. Peach had clearly only met him not too long ago. She also saw just how disappointed Peach had been when she first saw that he was just an ordinary lesser guard. Just how much time had passed since then? And yet they both seemed quite close.

Did something happen that I don’t know about?

Peach was given a fright. She quickly waved her hands and said, “No way, no way. Too many things happened just now, and I felt that the queen’s future… ahem. I felt that he was pretty strong.”

What if the queen misunderstands and thinks I’m trying to steal her food?

“Oh? Then what happened just now? I’m very interested.” The Mermaid Queen sat down casually on a soft seat and gestured for Zu An to sit as well.

Zu An was startled and quickly changed the topic. “Queen, can I ask where Suyin is right now?”

Peach was just about to respond to the queen’s question. When she heard that, she blinked, dazed.

What the heck are you two playing at?

Oh, right. The queen’s future husband doesn’t seem to know that Suyin is the queen. But the queen knows who he is. Are they roleplaying on purpose?

Heh, the queen really is a bit bad.

The Mermaid Queen’s face heated up. She coughed lightly and said, “Suyin was injured from the Four Way Palace mission and is resting in a secret room. The two of you can meet again after she recovers a bit.” She gave Peach a look as she spoke, silently warning her not to say anything.

Peach immediately sulked. 

I’m done for! I seem to have accidentally blurted out 'queen’s future husband' before! Will he be able to guess something from that?

But even if he finds out, it'll be because the queen’s future husband is smart. That only proves the queen’s insight. I can’t admit to it even if I’m beaten to death!

Zu An was feeling a bit annoyed.

Queen, you already blew your cover a long time ago, but look at how into the act you are.

He wanted to remind her a bit, but she was too serious in her act. If she ended up getting really angry when the truth was exposed, he could end up making an enemy for no reason.

I have to obtain the information I need before everything is exposed.

“By the way, queen, is there anyone in the Mermaid race with the surname Shang who is rather well known?”

Ever since he saw just how similar the Mermaid Queen and the Shang sisters were, he had always been puzzled. He really wanted to get to the bottom of this.

The queen voiced her surprise. “Could it be that you actually know someone from our Mermaid race surnamed Shang?”

Zu An was surprised. He'd received two pieces of information from her response. One was that there was someone surnamed Shang in the Mermaid race, and their status seemed to be quite special too. He naturally wouldn’t dare to speak the Shang sisters’ names and accidentally influence future history, however. Instead, he said, “I don’t know them myself, but I have a friend who knew two individuals who were surnamed Shang. They said the two were from the Mermaid race and I didn’t really believe it this entire time.”

“You have a friend?” The Mermaid Queen harrumphed and didn’t bother exposing his lie. “The Mermaid Queen has always had high affinity for music. That is why the Mermaid race is divided into five ancient surnames according to the notes: Gong, Shang, Jiao, Zheng, and Yu[1]. The Mermaid Queens throughout history have come from these five surnames throughout history in succession, but our Gong surname has always been the strongest. We have had the most queens.”

Even though this was Mermaid race history, there were many strong individuals in the Ocean races who knew about it, so she didn’t have to deliberately hide it.

Zu An was quite surprised. Why was it that in the Mermaid Race history he knew, it was actually the Shang clan who had the most queens? He had never heard of the Mermaid race having a Gong surname either.

1. These 'notes' refer to the five musical notes that rise in pitch, from gong (宫), shang (商), jue (角), zhi (徵), to yu (羽), which correspond roughly to the notes of 1, 2, 3, 5, and 6 in today's numbered musical notation. ☜

Translator's Thoughts

chapters.title: Chapter 2420: Rage Out Of Humiliation
chapters.body:
Chapter 2420: Rage Out Of Humiliation

In that instant, Zu An thought about many things. He even wondered if this spacetime fragment was the segment of history missing from the world he knew. All sorts of time travel terminology came to his mind.

When he remembered that this world’s Mermaid race did have a Shang surname, he felt that there was indeed likely a connection with the present era.

Then what about the Gong surname? Considering the pride the queen showed, the Gong surname was clearly the surname that carried absolute superiority throughout history. So why is it that there was no trace of it at all in the present?

Could it be that something ended up happening to the Mermaid race, which caused the Gong bloodline to completely disappear?

He couldn't help but shiver when he thought of that. He recalled recent events.

If I hadn’t appeared when the Mermaid Queen went to Four Way Palace, she would’ve most likely failed. Even if she managed to escape by a fluke, she wouldn’t have been able to survive the entrance of Mojard’s group just now.

Could it be that the Mermaid race’s Gong bloodline was completely destroyed because of what happened here, and that was why they were replaced by the Shang clan?

Now that Zu An had saved the Mermaid Queen, the Gong surname would still occupy the most powerful position of the Mermaid race. Then wouldn’t that mean the Shang surname would no longer hold that position in the future?

Once he had that thought, Zu An started to panic. Even though he had a favorable impression of the beautiful Mermaid Queen in front of him and was willing to help her too, if it ended up harming the Shang sisters, that was definitely something he wasn’t willing to see happen.

“What’s wrong?” the Mermaid Queen urgently asked when she sensed that something was wrong with his mood.

“It’s nothing.” Zu An was also a bit perplexed when he saw the genuine concern in her expression.

The Mermaid Queen is a really good person. Do I really just have to watch as she dies to Mojard?

But if I save her, what if that ends up causing a problem with the Shang sisters? What do I do then?

“Ah~”

A voice that resembled the sounds of nature gradually filled the air, and Zu An’s chaotic feelings gradually calmed down. Both his breathing and blood flow were restored to their best condition. It was clear that someone had applied some positive effects to his body.

He looked at the nearby beauty with a complicated expression. “Thank you, queen.”

The mermaids’ songs were works of art that harmonized with the spiritual essence of the world, as expected.

“It was no trouble. I sensed that your complexion seemed to have suddenly worsened, so I just made some sounds.” The Mermaid Queen’s face turned a bit red. “By the way, I said that you were my… Well, don’t treat those words as truth. I just said them to deal with the problem at hand.”

Peach blinked. 

Huh? What are these two playing at? Why don’t I seem to get what is going on?

Zu An nodded slightly. “This humble one understands. The queen needs not worry.”

When she saw how straightforward he was and that his emotions weren’t affected at all, the Mermaid Queen began to start questioning life a bit.

Could it be that in his eyes, I really am just that lacking in charm?

Any man who received her appreciation would immediately lose control of themselves. There was no way they would be able to remain this calm. This wasn’t her being self-absorbed; rather, it had been proven by countless similar situations throughout her life.

She suddenly thought of something. 

It seems the one he remembers is still Suyin, whom he went through all those trials and tribulations with, after all.

When there was another woman on a man's mind, no matter how beautiful other women were, he wouldn’t be shaken in the slightest.

Aiya, it must be because my charm is just too great. Even when I'm pretending to be ugly, I can still make a guy like me in a short amount of time.

She briefly felt happy when she realized that, but it soon gave way to annoyance.

Did I go too far?

He likes the other me, but if he finds out that that person is fake, won’t he be really hurt?

Do I really have to get to know him with this real identity? But the difference between us is so huge. It’d be impossible for us to be together!

I have to find a way to nip that love he has in the bud before it grows... But I absolutely cannot hurt him.

Ahhh this is so annoying! If I'd known things would end up like this, I wouldn’t have done all that acting.

Is there any way for me to make it up to him?

Her eyes shifted to the overjoyed Peach. 

Should I give Peach to him?

Even though Peach is young, she is pretty. I know just how many guards like her…

No way, no way!

For some reason, she immediately felt a bit annoyed as soon as that thought arose. She seemed to be subconsciously resistant to that plan.

Peach is my personal maid. Even though she is a bit slow in some aspects, she is very devoted to me. How can I just randomly give her to someone?

Yeah, it has to be this way!

She suddenly snapped out of her daze and looked at Peach. “Right, you still haven’t explained to me what happened before. Where did Deputy Officer Sha go?”

Zu An sighed. It seemed that in the end, he couldn't avoid that topic.

Apart from that, Peach was already feeling really pent up. She quickly explained with exaggerated emotion, “Deputy Officer Sha barged in with murderous intent and wanted to seize us to threaten you outside. Then, future… ahem. The young master interfered and killed Deputy Officer Sha.

“I don’t know what he did, but with a wave of his hand, Deputy Officer Sha’s corpse disappeared too. That was why the Incestuous King didn’t notice anything when he came to investigate. The young master really is amazing! He already predicted what the enemy would do…”

The maid was explaining everything in high spirits, but the smile on the Mermaid Queen’s face froze.

What? This foolish guard actually killed Deputy Officer Sha?

How could someone like this possibly kill him? How could he win against him?!

She was very pretty and there were many people with bad intentions who tried to approach her through all kinds of different ways. That was why she immediately realized that this guy had been fooling her this entire time! She hadn't thought of it before, but now that she linked it all up together, many suspicions now made sense.

This guy’s strength was clearly low, and yet he displayed a calm that didn’t match his ability.

He clearly seemed as if he didn’t know much about the world, and yet he was able to face me completely normally even after seeing my appearance.

He was probably just acting calm to gain my good intentions, right?

And he was able to change his appearance so easily with just a mask. The face I saw before might not even be real.

For some reason, she didn’t feel much anger, only a sense of heartache. “Just who are you really?” she asked as she stared at Zu An, unwilling to let go of even a single change in his expression.

As she spoke, Peach was in high spirits, but her story came to an abrupt halt when she heard that. She looked at the Mermaid Queen, then back at Zu An.

Wait, weren’t the two of you putting on some kind of act?

I was even starting to get confused by the two of you.

He was already about to become your husband, yet you’re still asking who he is?

Zu An opened his mouth, but the Mermaid Queen interrupted before he could say anything. “Don’t tell me you're some Eddie Peng or any nonsense like that!”

Since the disguise was fake and his skills were fake, that name was clearly also fake. Their relationship was actually founded entirely on lies! She discovered that even breathing was a bit hard right now.

Zu An was speechless. He sighed and said, “I must ask for the queen’s forgiveness. I didn’t intend to fool you; rather, there are just some important reasons that I can't tell you my true name.”

He didn’t want to disturb the timeline and cause some irreparable damage to his future world. After all, whether it was him or the Mermaid Queen, both of them were influential figures of their respective timelines.

“Good, you really are quite something.” The Mermaid Queen chuckled a few times, but there was no smile on her face at all. “Then did you already know who I was from the very start?”

Translator's Thoughts

chapters.title: Chapter 2421: Confession
chapters.body:
Chapter 2421: Confession

Zu An first shook his head, but then said, “At first, I didn’t know that you were the queen, but when I saw you use certain skills and treasures, I had my guesses.”

All sorts of vivid expressions flickered across the Mermaid Queen's face.  She'd thought he didn’t know when she was acting as the Mermaid Queen and Suyin this entire time! But this guy was just watching her make a fool of herself the entire time!

Ahhhhhhhhhh!

Her entire body went completely tense, and even her toes clenched. She was so embarrassed her toes were practically about to dig out a new Dragon Palace under her.

You have successfully trolled Gong Suyin for +666 +666 +666…

The Mermaid Queen broke character, completely broke character!

She'd felt a bit sorry that she was completely fooling with him, but the fool was actually her all along!

When he saw how she was about to explode, Zu An sighed. “Please don’t worry, queen. I wasn’t intending to have any relations with the Mermaid race at all from the very start, and I am not your enemy.”

“Hah, but there wasn’t a single word of truth this entire time. You’ve had me running in circles from your lies, and yet you’re saying you’re not my enemy?” The Mermaid Queen sneered. “What saving your little sister…”

“That one is real,” Zu An quickly said.

The Mermaid Queen was speechless.

Why does it feel as if you were only lying when it was toward me?!

“Speak! Just what is your objective? Otherwise, you might not be able to leave this place alive.” The Mermaid Queen got up, her beautiful hair floating in the water. She was now truly angered.

You have successfully trolled Gong Suyin for +555 +555 +555…

Peach was stunned. Why was the scene changing so quickly?

These two were acting so sweet and affectionate that I couldn't even take it anymore. Why are they suddenly about to attack each other?

She couldn't help but ask quietly, “Could there maybe be some kind of misunderstanding here?”

“You, be quiet! I want him to say it himself!” The Mermaid Queen shot her a look.

This guy really knows how to fool women. Just how long has he been with Peach, and yet she's already speaking up for him.

Zu An was also feeling a bit frustrated. He had done everything he could to avoid this result, and yet he still couldn't. He said, “I don’t have any such objectives. I actually didn’t want to get too close to you and didn’t even want to come here.”

The Mermaid Queen’s expression froze. She recalled everything that happened and remembered how he hadn't really been willing to come here when he heard that she was going to bring him. It was she who had grabbed his hand and insisted.

Once she realized that, she was completely and utterly embarrassed. So it turned out that he hadn’t had much interest in her at all from the beginning, and she was the one who'd continued to lead him along with her own wishful thinking!

But her confidence as the Ocean races’ number one beauty restored some confidence.

Something’s not right. How could there be any man who wouldn’t want to get closer to me?

“Could you be someone who holds a grudge against me?” she asked to test the waters.

“There is no grudge. To a certain extent, I even share some karma with you,” Zu An explained after thinking for a bit.

“What karma?” The Mermaid Queen couldn't figure out what kind of karma they could possibly share.

Zu An remained silent. It was obvious that he couldn't talk about it.

The Mermaid Queen was so angry she laughed. “Then are you actually a monster?”

She figured that unless she shared a blood grudge with him, or he was from the other camp, he would have no choice but to act on his own interest. Otherwise, there was no reason at all for him to avoid her. She'd even been wondering how to advise him not to get too involved... but now, she realized that she was the one who had gotten too invested!

“No, I'm a human. The monsters are my enemy,” Zu An replied.

“A human?” The Mermaid Queen thought for a bit. The humans did seem as if they were starting to flourish. But compared to the fiends and Ocean races, they were still too weak. Since when did the humans have someone like him?

“Let me see your real appearance.” The Mermaid Queen stared at him. She knew that everything she knew about him was a lie. She had to at least know what he looked like, right? Or else, how could it even be called getting to know each other?

After some hesitation, Zu An still shook his head. There were too many ways to record appearances in this world. Recording mirrors and certain outstanding drawing skills, for instance, could perfectly preserve one’s appearance. He couldn't take the risk.

The Mermaid Queen’s expression became completely cold. He wasn’t even willing to show her his real face! But while she was angry, she was also curious. Just why was that?

“Don’t tell me that you’re related to me somehow, and that you’re actually my little brother whom I’ve already lost touch with for many years, right?” The Mermaid Queen sneered. She obviously didn’t have a little brother, so she didn’t believe what he was saying at all.

Zu An was about to say something when his expression suddenly changed. He said, “Be careful, someone has barged in.”

The Mermaid Queen was stunned. This was her temporary official residence, with guards stationed outside. She hadn’t even sensed anything off. Could it be something this guy was doing to divert her attention? She was about to speak up and mock him when the windows split open. A figure rushed in and attacked the Mermaid Queen.

Fortunately, the warning had already prepared her a bit. Her hands moved quickly as she used her skills, and the Deep Sea Harp immediately played several beautiful yet dangerous runes.

Boom!

The two sides clashed. All of the objects in the room were scattered by the berserk power.

Zu An looked at the instruments scattered everywhere. He reflexively reached out toward Peach, who flailed around for a while before latching onto his thigh. This really was clinging to someone in both the physical and the metaphorical sense!

A trickle of blood came out from the Mermaid Queen’s mouth. She couldn't be bothered to wipe it, however. She looked at the intruder and asked, “Who are you?”

The other party was dressed in black clothes and wore a mask. It was impossible to see their appearance. But this individual had infiltrated her territory silently and even injured her while she was prepared. There weren’t that many across the entire Ocean races who were capable of such a thing.

The masked person said in a sinister voice, “Hm? I didn’t expect the Mermaid Queen, who is known for her beauty, to be so vigilant.” He'd been planning to immediately restrain her through an ambush, but he hadn’t expected her to already anticipate his arrival and react so quickly.

The Mermaid Queen gave Zu An a glance. The shock she felt grew even stronger. 

He actually sensed his arrival before I did! Could it be that his cultivation is even higher than I imagined?

Even so, she couldn't bring herself to feel happy. Compared to someone profound and unfathomable, she felt closer to that slightly slow guard. However, she saw how Peach was clinging to his thigh as if she'd never let go and immediately felt terrible.

This lass is so disappointing!

“The honorable Incestuous King is actually hiding his head and only showing his tail. You’ve barged into the Mermaid Queen’s personal chambers in the middle of the night. If this becomes public knowledge, I wonder what kind of reaction the Ocean races will have.” Zu An spoke up just then. He saw that the Mermaid Queen was a bit distracted and was worried that she would underestimate the other party, so he quickly warned her. He wondered if the Mermaid race’s Gong surname had been erased from history because of what happened today…

Sure enough, when she heard that it was actually Mojard, the Mermaid Queen’s fine hairs stood on end. She didn’t dare to think about anything else anymore.

When he saw that he was exposed, Mojard didn’t keep up the act. He removed his mask. “Hm? I already concealed my aura and not even the Mermaid Queen recognized me, and yet you were able to?”

At the same time, he became a bit vigilant too.

This guy seems to be a bit stronger than I imagined.

Zu An smiled. “I was just speaking randomly to test the waters. I didn’t expect it to really be you.”

Mojard was speechless.

You have successfully trolled Mojard for +666 +666 +666…

Translator's Thoughts

chapters.title: Chapter 2422: Toyed-With, Broken Incestuous King
chapters.body:
Chapter 2422: Toyed-With, Broken Incestuous King

Mojard gave Zu An a confused look. He didn’t know if the latter really had just made a blind guess or if he was covering something up. He just felt that he couldn't really see through this person.

The Mermaid Queen realized what was going on and coldly said, “Your respected self is still someone with quite the reputation, and yet you are sneaking into a woman’s quarters in the night. Are you really not worried that you’ll make a fool of yourself once news of this gets out?”

Meanwhile, she secretly called on the guards outside. She needed to blow this matter as out of proportion as possible. If enough people saw what was going on, Mojard’s options would be greatly limited.

Unfortunately, there was no response at all from any of the guards outside no matter how she called out. Her heart sank.

Mojard laughed loudly. “The queen was previously able to set up a soundproofing barrier around the Four Way Palace; did you think this king couldn't do the same?”

“Just what do you want to do?” the Mermaid Queen asked on the surface, but her eyes darted around looking for a way to escape.

“Escape is prohibited here!” Mojard clearly saw what she was trying to do and immediately spoke this rule into existence.

The Mermaid Queen immediately felt her body become heavy. There seemed to be something intangible starting to restrict her. If she tried to run, that restriction would immediately tighten up.

“Did the queen really think that I would return empty-handed after coming all the way here?” Mojard sneered.

“I already explained to you that I wasn’t the assassin at the Four Way Palace. What are you trying to do?” As she spoke, the Mermaid Queen’s hand landed on the Deep Sea Harp’s strings.

“Both of us know what happened. That’s right, I don’t have anything proving that it was you for other people, but sometimes, no proof is needed in this world.” Mojard laughed sinisterly.

As he spoke, he leaped at the Mermaid Queen, leaving her shocked. She played her harp while telling Zu An and Peach, “You two, hurry and run!”

She knew she wasn’t Mojard’s match. But as long as these two could contact the people outside, Mojard wouldn’t dare to cross the line too far. Even so, the moment she said that, she remembered that Zu An was a swindler. 

Why am I being worried about him at all?

She continued to play dozens of notes that floated in front of her to try and stop Mojard’s charge.

But she'd never expected Mojard to have other plans! It looked as if he was attacking her, but he suddenly changed directions and sent a palm smashing at Zu An.

His palm rapidly increased in size and slammed down at Zu An like Mt. Tai. Just the wind pressure alone was enough to shatter the chairs, tables, and vases in the room.

Peach wanted to run, but she couldn't move. Her body had already gone completely limp.

It’s over, it’s over… I’m going to be smashed into meat paste by this palm…

Yeah, the queen’s husband will be smashed into meat paste too. I wonder if the queen will be jealous if she sees that the two of us are pulverized together.

My queen, I really didn’t do it on purpose…

…

In that instant, all sorts of strange thoughts rushed into her head. She even found it a bit laughable herself. She was already about to die, and yet these were the kinds of things she was still thinking about!

Hm? Wait, why am I not dead yet?

She raised her head in confusion and saw that Mojard’s palm had already descended. But halfway to its destination, it was blocked by one hand from the queen's future husband.

Blocked?

Her eyes immediately went completely wide.

The queen’s future husband is that amazing?

It wasn’t just her, even the Mermaid Queen became a bit absent-minded. Even though she had guessed that he was mysterious, she hadn’t expected him to have hidden his strength that well!

Mojard’s expression changed greatly. He felt as if his mountainous palm had hit empty air. But his palm had clearly made contact with the other party’s hand!

However, he quickly realized that rather than empty space, there was a black hole there that sucked in all things. He even felt all of his internal ki becoming a bit unstable, as if it was going to pour out and leave him entirely. He exclaimed, “Just who are you?”

Even though the two of them had exchanged blows, Mojard discovered that his opponent’s cultivation was very, very high. This kind of strength was something only a few individuals could have, so there was no way he wouldn't recognize that person's name.

Zu An chuckled. “That seems like quite the popular question today.”

The Mermaid Queen rolled her eyes, but she mysteriously felt a bit more at ease. When Mojard appeared just now, she'd felt extremely tense. But now that she saw that the foolish guard was actually so strong, she suddenly didn’t feel worried anymore.

Even though he'd deceived her, for some reason, she trusted that he wouldn’t treat her badly. She didn’t have any proof, but perhaps it was just her natural woman’s intuition.

Mojard was stunned.

You should at least respect the question I’m asking, right? What are the two of you exchanging flirtatious looks for?

“So who are you?!” He secretly cursed this damned couple while gritting his teeth.

You have successfully trolled Mojard for +110 +110 +110…

“I want to answer you too, but it’s an answer I can’t give.” Zu An felt a bit depressed too. He hadn’t expected to experience this kind of issue in the spacetime fragment.

“Are you messing with me?!” Mojard’s face darkened. He started his soulspeak, “This place forbids…”

But midway through his sentence, he suddenly heard something else.

“What you lookin' at?”

“I’m looking at you, shithead!”

Mojard was speechless.

Peach blinked her large eyes, stunned. Why did she find this scene in front of her a bit hard to understand?

The Incestuous King was incredibly famous, known as one of the world’s most powerful individuals. Even though she didn’t know who the queen’s husband was, he was clearly also an extremely deep and unfathomable person. Shouldn’t a battle between two individuals like this have been world-shattering? Why did they sound more like two gangsters cursing each other on the streets?

The Mermaid Queen smiled. This was the same sentence that had stopped Mojard from using his skill when the guard saved her at the Four Way Palace. She'd been really puzzled as to why someone like Mojard would play such frivolous children's games. But now, it seemed that the sentence actually contained some kind of powerful law that perfectly countered Mojard’s soulspeak.

Mojard was even more experienced and knowledgeable than her. How could he still not know what was going on? He began, “You…”

“What you lookin’ at?”

“I’m looking at you, shithead!”

Mojard was speechless.

I wasn’t even planning to use soulspeak! Are you not even going to let someone speak normally?

You have successfully trolled Mojard for +119 +119 +119…

Zu An chuckled awkwardly. “Sorry, that was a conditioned reflex. Go ahead.”

Mojard gave him a look of lingering fear. When he was sure that Zu An wasn’t going to do it again, he tested the waters by asking, “Since you know a skill on this level, just which world's powerful being are you?”

After fighting in this world for many years, he didn’t know of such a person from the Fiend, Demon, Ocean, Human, Beast, or any other races’ outstanding figures.

The Mermaid Queen was startled. When she looked at Zu An, her expression became a bit gentler.

It was no wonder that he'd never said anything. So he came from a different world and would have to leave eventually!

He doesn’t want to hurt me, so that's why he always tried to maintain some distance.

He really is considerate, and yet I misunderstood him.

Translator's Thoughts

chapters.title: Chapter 2423: Path Of Annihilation
chapters.body:
Chapter 2423: Path Of Annihilation

When he saw the gentleness in the Mermaid Queen's expression, Zu An actually went on high alert.

Wait, sis, why are you suddenly like this? I didn’t even say anything!

Don’t come over here!

After learning of the Mermaid race’s behind-the-scenes story, he didn’t dare to get any closer to this woman. Otherwise, if the Shang sisters ended up disappearing as a result, it would be too late even for tears.

Mojard’s entire body went numb when he saw the two exchange looks back and forth. He felt like a third wheel who wasn't supposed to be here. He coughed lightly, reminding Zu An to at least retain some basic respect for his question.

Only then did Zu An react and say, “I can tell you, but you need to answer one of my questions first.”

“What question?” Mojard frowned slightly. But if he could figure who this was, answering some less sensitive questions didn’t seem to be entirely out of the question.

“Where did you put the Peacock Princess?” Zu An’s relationship with the Peacock race was very good, especially Kong Nanwu who was his good friend. He couldn't just watch as something ended up happening to her ancestor.

The Peacock Princess' situation was different from that of the Mermaid Queen. There was no record of the Gong surname in Zu An's time. He was worried that he would end up affecting the timeline if he got too involved there. But there was clearly a Peacock race in the future. He was worried that something might happen to Kong Nanwu’s side if he didn’t save them.

Sigh, I really have it way too hard…

The Mermaid Queen’s heart felt warm when she heard Zu An’s question.

He knows I took that huge risk to save the Peacock Princess, so that's why he still hasn’t forgotten to help me.

He really is amazing, really.

Zu An had to really force himself not to turn away when he sensed that burning gaze. He was getting more and more confused.

Just what the heck is going on with this Mermaid Queen?!

“Don’t worry, she’s not dead. She has already completely sided with us and will serve our lord from now on.” Mojard sighed in relief. That wasn’t a sensitive question, and it was fine to tell him.

“Nonsense! How could she possibly side with you? Just what did you do to her?!” The Mermaid Queen was shocked and angry. She was close to the Peacock Princess and they'd bonded a bit over their conversation a few days ago. She knew that the latter detested the monsters bitterly. How could she possibly side with them?

“Her choice to side with us is already a reality. This king treats his subordinates quite well. There is no need for the queen to trouble yourself over this,” Mojard said with a faint smile. Then, he turned to Zu An. His intention was clear.

I've already answered your question, so now it's your turn.

Zu An now replied, “I came from a place I cannot talk about. If I say my name, it will cause a lot of people to die and may even bring about the destruction of the world!”

The Mermaid Queen felt more and more relieved. 

He did have secret troubles after all. No wonder he couldn't tell me before.

Mojard’s expression changed. “Your world follows the path of annihilation devoutly?”

Zu An was stunned. What he'd just said was the truth. If he told the people here that he was from the future, that could really end up shaking up the world. But the question Mojard asked in return was a bit interesting. What was this path of annihilation?

What kind of person was Mojard? He immediately sensed Zu An's strange expression and became angry. “You were lying to me!”

You have successfully trolled Mojard for +110 +110 +110…

“What is this path of annihilation you speak of?” Zu An figured that since Mojard already knew that wasn’t what he was, he might as well be straightforward.

Mojard said with a sneer, “You didn’t even know about that? Then it seems like you can only be so strong.”

He didn’t feel any more reservations after saying that, and charged at Zu An. As he moved, his body suddenly began to change. His arm and leg muscles began to rapidly swell, and soon, his entire body became a few sizes larger. He gave off the pressure of a giant prehistoric beast.

The Mermaid Queen quickly shouted, “Be careful, that is the monsters’ berserk mode! Their power and speed increase drastically, so you absolutely cannot fight him in close quarters!”

She played her harp as she spoke, sending some negative debuffs at Mojard. She didn’t know Zu An’s abilities or fighting method yet and didn’t dare to give him any buffs beforehand, worrying that it would negatively affect him instead. After all, the powerful had clear control over their own strength and speed. Suddenly changing them could easily bring about negative consequences.

Zu An gave Mojard a curious look and asked, “What material are your clothes made of? Why haven't they exploded even though you became so much bigger?”

Mojard was bewildered.

That’s what you’re concerned with at such a crucial moment in such an intense battle?

He felt as if this man in front of him could have some mental disorder. If he's a mental case, he ought to just be smacked to death. His expression became malicious as he sent a palm crashing down toward Zu An's head. The Mermaid Queen’s weakening sound rune only shone for a brief moment before it shattered under the power of his body. Mojard sneered. In front of absolute strength, these tricks were meaningless.

From how overbearing the enemy’s attack was, Zu An was worried that the pitiful little maid who was clinging to his leg tightly would be smacked into a bloody paste if he tried to dodge. That was why, with a wave of gentle force, he ‘kicked’ Peach over to the Mermaid Queen’s side. Meanwhile, he sent a palm strike to counter Mojard's.

The sizes of their bodies were just too different. His hand really was pitifully small under Mojard’s massive palm. But when they clashed, there was no sound at all; instead, there was something that was like a black hole in between. The force of their clash was so powerful that it instantly destroyed the space between their palms.

Mojard, who had pounced forward ferociously, was blown back. Zu An was also knocked back by over ten meters from the force; he remarked, “Your strength is pretty great after all.”

Zu An had decided to clash head-on to test out Mojard's strength a bit, and discovered that the latter was quite strong after all. This wasn't the weakened Mojard he knew, nor was the latter bound by any laws of the world.

“How refreshing!” Mojard laughed before striking again. Even without using Soulspeak, he was still powerful in close-quarters combat.

The two sides quickly tangled around each other, but Mojard quickly found himself getting annoyed. “Why don’t you fight for real if you have the skill? What meaning is there in using these kinds of tricks?!”

Zu An no longer fought against Mojard directly like the first time. Instead, there almost seemed to be a black hole covering his entire body. Mojard’s ki was always completely absorbed away before it even made contact with Zu An’s own, making the fight really frustrating.

You have successfully trolled Mojard for +120 +120 +120…

“Your respected self is still a well known figure for better or for worse. Why are you speaking such childish words?” Zu An’s tone carried a bit of ridicule.

Mojard choked. He knew this strange ability was also part of Zu An’s strength. There was no way he wouldn’t use it if he had it himself. But the absorption force was a bit too strong and not even his strength could deal with it. Furthermore, if he was careless, some of his body’s ki could even get sucked away.

He mused, “This feeling seems to resemble the legendary Taotie. What relationship do you have with the Taotie?”

Zu An was a bit surprised. This wasn’t the first time someone had said similar things. This Taotie was clearly a different thing from the monsters he'd encountered previously in the secret dungeon.

Could it be that there are more powerful Taoties across the realms?

“You called me someone who followed the path of annihilation before, and now you’re saying I have something to do with the Taotie. I feel as if you’re just guessing completely randomly or something.” Zu An taunted Mojard on purpose to see if he could gain any related information.

Translator's Thoughts

chapters.title: Chapter 2424: I Can Spare Your Life
chapters.body:
Chapter 2424: I Can Spare Your Life

“Judging from how you’re speaking, you don’t seem to be familiar with these things. That’s quite puzzling.” Mojard was confused. How could someone who didn’t know about these things become so strong?

Zu An smiled. “If your respected self can tell me, I can spare your life today.”

The Mermaid Queen was filled with shock. After all, even though she knew that Zu An had hidden his strength well, she hadn’t expected that it was to this extent!

He can actually fight on equal terms with Mojard!

No, it actually seems as if Mojard is at a disadvantage!

And the way he spoke sounded really natural. Could it be that he has absolute confidence in winning?

But this is the incredibly famous Incestuous King! There are probably fewer than three people who can win against him in the world right now.

Mojard was a bit stunned, but then he was so angry he actually laughed. “Hahahah! This is truly amusing. It has already been a long time since someone spoke to me in such a way!”

He was already feeling really annoyed. The Soulspeak he was most proficient in had been countered, and he had to worry about that black hole skill in close-quarters combat. But now the other party was offering to spare his life?

Nonsense!

You have successfully trolled Mojard for +599 +599 +599…

He reached out, and a giant blade appeared out of nowhere. Then, it slammed down at Zu An.

“Obliterate!”

Since the power of his punches and kicks would only be neutralized by the black hole skill, he’d just switch weapons!

I refuse to believe that you can even absorb away this kind of attack!

As soon as he said that word, a massive wave of blade ki forty meters in length came crashing down. All kinds of defensive formations flickered around the Mermaid Queen’s chambers, but they completely shattered after persisting for only a single second. The entire palace was sliced through by the blade energy as if it was made out of tofu!

The Mermaid Queen was horrified when she saw the bottomless gorge carved out by the blade energy. Was this the Incestuous King’s true strength?

It seems he wasn’t using all of his power at all in our previous fight!

But she quickly grew nervous. All of the objects around the foolish guard had already been smashed into powder by the powerful sword energy, so was he still alright?

She was looking for him when a voice came from above. “What a funny fella. You remind me a bit of Nie the Human King. You said 'Obliterate', but you were actually using 'Mountain Cleave'.”

Zu An was standing on the roof of a nearby palace.

Mojard frowned. He harrumphed and said, “What Nie the Human King? I’ve never heard of him. Just die!”

He brandished his blade again. This time, his blade ki became a hundred meters long and sliced straight at Zu An.

With a tap of Zu An’s toes, he instantly moved a hundred meters away. However, the blade energy actually reappeared in front of him the next instant.

“Aura homing?” Zu An reacted quickly and evaded to the side.

The hundred-meter-long blade wave followed him wherever he went, destroying all of the trees and residences wherever it passed. The palace was almost completely destroyed.

After this huge commotion, the Mermaid Queen’s subordinates finally realized what was going on. They all rushed to her side to protect her.

Many of them were shocked to see that Mojard had come back after leaving, but what was even more shocking was that the one on the other side was actually fighting on par with Mojard.

That seems to be the lover the Mermaid Queen just announced!

Sigh, we must really have terrible judgment. We were thinking that he looked so ordinary and weak that even we could easily replace him.

But this really isn’t a situation we could replace him in…

The Mermaid Queen said nervously, “Hurry up and help him!”

The guards pointed at themselves with stunned looks. “Me?”

The Mermaid Queen finally reacted to the current situation too. She was so worried that she'd ended up losing her composure. Mojard was clearly truly angered, and was now fighting with a hundred and twenty percent of his usual strength. That meant this was a kind of fight that was difficult for even her to participate in, let alone these guards.

She quickly had the guards escort the maids and servants to a safe place to hide her embarrassment.

…

How could the Dragon King not know what was happening when there was such a huge commotion taking place?

When he sensed that it came from the Mermaid Queen’s side, he couldn't help but curse, “Another damned assassin? Is my freaking Dragon Palace an assassins' public restroom or something?! Can they come and go wherever they please?”

He was really pissed off today. First, there was that assassin in Four Way Palace who had killed the monsters’ head emissary. He'd been horrified at the news, but fortunately, the Incestuous King Mojard had been present. Even though he had been forced to receive that person’s wrath, in the end, the other party’s anger was still appeased.

Shortly after, they'd gone to the Mermaid Queen’s chambers to capture the assassin. The Fiend races’ emissary, the Peacock Princess, was captured as a result. But once wasn’t enough; he'd been forced to accompany Mojard over to the Mermaid Queen’s place again.

Sigh, the appearance I tried to keep up in front of the Mermaid Queen for many years has probably been all but destroyed now. She is probably utterly disappointed with me now, right?

What made him lose his cool even more was that the goddess whom he had pursued for so many years, yet only received indifference in return, actually had a lover! And she'd even admitted to it in front of everyone!

On top of that, it was just a lesser guard who seemed ordinary in every way.

How ridiculous!

He was full of resentment. Not even the gentle clam ladies could completely rid him of his negative feelings. Now that he heard the disturbance in the palace, he finally couldn't take it anymore and exploded.

I don’t care who it is. This king is going to make them pay!

I can’t offend the Incestuous King, and I can’t offend the Mermaid Queen, but do you think I can’t offend you either?!

He rushed toward the Mermaid Queen's residence angrily and prepared to show his power to erase the shame he had shown tonight in front of his goddess.

But when he saw that the one causing trouble was the Incestuous King, his expression instantly froze.

What did I say I was coming here for again?

Forget it, I'll pretend I didn’t say anything.

He naturally couldn't offend the Incestuous King, but why was even that lesser guard he looked down upon so strong?

There were other strong individuals who had arrived when they received the news. When they saw the battle taking place above, they were also greatly shaken.

No wonder the Mermaid Queen favors him; this kid is indeed quite special.

Zu An’s body turned into a bolt of lightning, flickering as he evaded. However, the blade wave continued to pursue him relentlessly.

Mojard had an evil grin on his face. “How can my blade be that easily avoided?!”

The next second, the blade that chased after Zu An disappeared. However, the sky suddenly became brighter. Even though it was nighttime, in that instant, it became as bright as day.

It turned out that every single one of the cuts Mojard had made remained in the air. Now, those slashes flickered and manifested a blinding web. It cut off everything within a kilometer, making it so that Zu An had nowhere left to run.

“Demon Blade, Inescapable Net!” Mojard roared. All of the blades instantly exploded to attack Zu An.

“Ahhh!” The Mermaid Queen cried out, her entire body shaking. However, the battle was so far away that she couldn't help at all.

Peach was also grabbing the queen’s arm nervously, but she was actually a bit more confident than the queen. 

The queen’s husband is so awesome, he’ll definitely have a solution.

Zu An spread open his hands, and a transparent bell surrounded him. When those countless slashes landed on him, everything was blocked by the bell.

But the power of Mojard’s attack couldn't be underestimated. When the lights disappeared, the giant golden bell also completely shattered.

Mojard’s expression changed. He hadn’t anticipated that Zu An would have such a powerful defensive skill.

Zu An said coldly, “I’ve been letting you attack this entire time. I should take a turn now, no?”

The moment he spoke, water ripples appeared behind him. Golden weapons slowly flew out one after another.

Translator's Thoughts

chapters.title: Chapter 2425: Now That I Have Seen The East Wind, How Can I Not Be Joyful
chapters.body:
Chapter 2425: Now That I Have Seen The East Wind, How Can I Not Be Joyful

“Those are…” The Ocean race onlookers were all shocked when they saw this spectacular sight.

“Divine weapons! Every single one is a legendary divine weapon!”

“No, they’re not divine weapons. Even though the auras are similar, the auras they emanate are thirty percent or so weaker than real divine weapons.” There were many powerful individuals present, so someone quickly determined this.

“Hah, it’s just that each one is a bit weaker. Why don’t you open your eyes and look at just how many of them there are?!” another person immediately fired back.

The one from before immediately stopped talking.

Right, if over ten thousand weapons that were close to deity-grade bombarded a target, it would be way stronger than one or two true deity-grade weapons.

When she heard the surrounding discussions, Peach excitedly swung the Mermaid Queen’s arm. “Queen, queen, your husband is so handsome!”

A blush appeared on the Mermaid Queen’s face. Then, she shot Peach an embarrassed and annoyed look. “Shut up! Stop speaking nonsense.”

Peach stuck out her tongue and continued to stare at that figure with widened eyes.

Mojard felt a strange sense of unease. If even those Ocean race experts could see what was going on, how could he not? He even felt as if those weapons in the sky weren’t real and were created through a certain ability.

Of course, they weren’t exactly temporary weapons. Even though the amount of time these weapons could exist for was up for debate, right now, they weren't that much weaker than real deity-grade weapons!

Just who is this person? Why does he know such a powerful skill?!

He subconsciously wanted to run, but he could clearly sense a powerful killing intent lock onto him. The instant he ran, a devastating attack would trigger.

“This place…” Helpless to do anything else, he tried to use his soulspeak, but he immediately realized that the opponent had the ‘what you lookin’ at’ ability to counter him. When he recalled the suffering of having to reply ‘I’m looking at you, shithead’, he really didn’t want to embarrass himself in front of all of these people.

He could only release a loud roar out of helplessness. His eyes turned entirely red, and his body increased in size again. He grew at a visible rate until he became massive, towering over a kilometer in height.

ROAR!

The giant monster roared toward the sky, and the blade in his hand released a blinding blue light that rivaled the golden radiance in the sky.

“The monsters’ transformation ability!” The Dragon King’s expression was grave as he muttered to himself.

The reason why the monsters were so powerful, apart from their mysterious skills, was because of their superior close-combat abilities. Even ordinary monsters were able to strengthen their physical bodies if they entered this berserk mode and turned into giant creatures dozens of meters tall. But the stronger monsters’ abilities evolved to an even more incredible level, allowing their bodies to become hundreds to thousands of meters tall.

Even if such a physique seemed a bit cumbersome, those who faced such a thing personally inevitably realized how great the pressure would be, to the extent that it could trigger an innate impulse to bow down. Just a casual step from a monster this size would be equivalent to a normal cultivator flying at full speed for a long time. Their movements would look a bit more sluggish and heavy than usual, but with such a disparity in size, their opponent would seem even more cumbersome and slow.

The sight even shocked Zu An a bit. This Mojard was indeed much, much stronger than the one he'd met first. He didn’t know what had happened to Mojard's body to cause the latter to end up the way he was in the future.

ROAR!

Mojard’s eyes turned entirely red. Then, the shining blue blade cleaved down toward Zu An. He'd already recognized that Zu An’s divine weapons were a long-range attack, so he decided to close the distance and increase his advantage.

With every step he took, many of the Dragon Palace’s structures were crushed into fine powder. Fortunately, the Dragon Palace’s guards had gotten early warning and already moved out of the way. Otherwise, just this step alone would have caused a bloody calamity.

The Dragon King’s eyelids twitched when he saw this.

Can’t these two freaking deity-like beings fight somewhere else? My Dragon Palace might not even survive today.

He quickly ordered the Dragon Palace’s experts to activate the palace’s great defensive formation. Even though it likely wouldn't be enough to block their attacks, it would still at least be able to block the blast waves a bit and limit the Dragon Palace’s losses.

In response to Mojard’s attack, the sword formation created by the Rune Weapon Chart seemed to have been triggered. Endless golden sword energy attacked him. However, the blade in Mojard’s hands erupted with blue blade ki, blocking all of the golden swords. At the same time, he closed in on Zu An one step after another. A proud smile appeared on the corners of his lips. 

Was that all? Once I get close to you, I’ll crush you like an ant!

As the giant monster got closer and closer to Zu An, Peach started to panic. “Queen, is your husband at a disadvantage now? This monster is just too scary…”

The queen was completely focused on the battle and couldn't be bothered to complain about the nicknames anymore. She reflexively replied, “It should still be fine. He still seems calm…”

Before she even finished, Zu An formed a sword seal with his hand, unleashing countless beams of sword ki that flew toward Mojard from every direction.

Mojard was startled. He wasn’t expecting the sword ki to be able to change directions as if it had intelligence! He roared, and several more arms appeared on his body. They held a shield, a mace, and other weapons, blocking the attacks coming from different directions.

The Dragon King was clearly unhappy. Part of the reason why the Dragon race was so strong, apart from the skills they could use in their human form, was their powerful original form. The pressure that came from their thousand-meter-long bodies would be enough to make any enemy feel despair. But if he faced Mojard’s massive transformation, Mojard could just easily grab his body, then use the other hands to tear apart his skin and tendons…

Zu An was a bit surprised.

No wonder the Monster Lord's fame was matched by Mojard's in this age. One has three heads, while the other has six arms.

But why did you become this big? Were you worried that I didn’t have a big enough target to hit?

Mojard cackled with laughter. “Your attack seems tricky, but I’ve already seen through it. There are only a few weapons within your sword ki that are strong. The others are just for appearance and don’t truly have the power of divine weapons.

“If my suspicions aren’t wrong, then your skill requires you to refine corresponding deity-grade weapons. But real-deity grade weapons are rare, so how many could you have collected all on your own? Hahaha!”

When they heard Mojard’s laughter, many experts in the Dragon Palace realized what was going on. 

So that's what it was!

This Incestuous King is powerful, as expected. He actually saw through the illusion so quickly.

But they also knew that the weaker sword ki was only ineffective against Mojard’s several kilometers tall transformation. Even if they weren’t really refined deity- grade weapons, they were definitely not attacks that ordinary cultivators could fight against. If they were in the Incestuous King’s place, they'd probably have already been sliced apart by the ten thousand blades.

Zu An chuckled. “Is that so? Then please have a taste of this next batch of weapons.”

As soon as he said that, long tube-like weapons appeared out of thin air behind him. Some were long and thin, while others were short and thick.

“What are those?” Mojard went on high alert. He could clearly sense that these things were different from the sword energy from earlier. It seemed as if every one of them was a true deity-grade weapon.

“Dongfeng missiles!”[1]

1. Dongfeng means 'East Wind' ☜

Translator's Thoughts

chapters.title: Chapter 2426: Predetermined Fate
chapters.body:
Chapter 2426: Predetermined Fate

The east wind scatters a thousand blossoms at night, and as it blows, stars fall like rain.

In order to use these weapons of mass destruction, Zu An had previously needed to be in a secret dungeon where the natural ki was especially abundant. But even though this world’s ki wasn’t as rich as that of the Imperial Tomb secret dungeon, it was still far superior to his Cultivation World. And he'd become much, much more powerful himself too. That was why there wasn’t too much of an issue for him to produce these devastating missiles.

Even though Mojard didn’t know what Dongfeng missiles were, he could clearly sense danger. The next second, he vanished from his original location.

Everyone watching was stunned. After all, Mojard was a massive beast thousands of meters tall. How could he disappear just like that? They all felt a bit of discomfort from the sudden change.

“Is it some instant teleportation skill? Is he hiding somewhere to prepare an ambush?” The Mermaid Queen was nervous, her eyes filled with worry.

Zu An’s divine sense covered the entire place. He discovered that Mojard really had left. The latter had probably used some life-saving secret skill.

That guy really is careful.

He’s clearly so strong already, and yet he still prepared something like this beforehand.

He'd actually wanted to test things out and see if he could really impact history.

Since Mojard already existed in the later world, Zu An definitely couldn't kill him. Even if he killed Mojard here, the latter didn’t really have much of a relationship with his lovers, so it was likely to be alright. But that would mean history, or fate, could be changed.

However, today’s events proved that the the alternative was more likely, that fate was already predetermined… His mood immediately worsened when he realized that. Anyone who learned that nothing they did could change a predetermined fate wouldn’t feel that great, after all.

With a wave of his hand, the Dongfeng missiles dispersed. He only left behind a single small one. It turned into a comet and fired toward the distance. Soon after, a mushroom cloud soared into the sky, turning all of the monsters within into smoke.

He'd been worried that he could end up hurting the Peacock Princess or other innocents, so he made sure to check with his divine sense beforehand. He didn’t sense her at all, though. Additionally, because two assassins had appeared in succession, the monster emissaries didn’t trust the Dragon Palace guards and had chased them all away, taking over all responsibility for their own safety... But that just allowed Zu An to catch them all in one go.

The aftereffects were powerful. If not for the fact that the Dragon Palace was made of extraordinary materials and every single palace had powerful defensive formations around it, the entire place could have been destroyed by the massive explosion. Even so, the defensive formations flickered intensely, and the palace rocked back and forth.

Many Ocean race onlookers rocked unsteadily from side to side. Even the truly strong could only barely remain upright. All of them were shocked. If even one of these weapons could produce such a result, what about the ten thousand that they'd just seen in the air? It was no wonder that even someone as powerful as Mojard would immediately choose to run.

Zu An was also a bit startled. The terrifying destructive power of the missile seemed to be quite a bit stronger than the last time. It seemed that apart from the inherent power of the weapon itself, the Rune Weapon Chart would also produce stronger weapons depending on his own strength.

Just then, the Dragon King approached him and said, “I greet your respected self. May I ask how I should address you?”

He had secretly cursed this ordinary-looking fool quite a bit inside, envying the latter for being able to receive the Mermaid Queen’s good intentions. But now that he learned just how strong the latter was, he naturally changed his attitude. This guy was actually even stronger than the Incestuous King! And he seemed to really hate the monsters too. It seemed the Dragon King now had another choice.

After all, the Dragon King had actually known fully well how reasonable the Mermaid Queen’s suggestions were. However, he also knew that even the powerful Fiend races had been defeated by the monsters, and even the Fiend Emperor who was stronger than him had died. Even though the Fiend races still had a resistance army, they were just struggling on death’s door and their destruction was imminent.

If he continued to cooperate with the Fiend races, that would only lead the Ocean races to disaster. That was why he'd figured he could only take the gamble that the monsters would comply with their promise to treat the Ocean races favorably. He'd had no choice before. But with such a powerful individual being an enemy of the monsters, he saw many potential opportunities.

The other Ocean race experts were all glad. When they heard that this person was the Mermaid Queen’s lover, they'd all been so angry that their lungs were about to explode. They'd all wanted to teach him a proper lesson, and maybe even erase him from this world forever.

Now, it seemed to have been really good that they hadn’t acted too rashly. Otherwise, he definitely wouldn't have been the one to disappear.

As expected of the Mermaid Queen. Her insight in choosing men really is astounding.

Perhaps they'd still feel some jealousy if the strength difference wasn’t too great. But with such a ridiculous gap, their jealousy naturally disappeared. They'd previously felt that they wouldn’t be convinced no matter who the Mermaid Queen chose, but it seemed they could accept this now...

“My name is a taboo. You do not need to know it.” Zu An naturally didn’t want to leave his name behind in history. After saying that, he prepared to turn around and leave.

The Dragon King choked.

This capable individual really isn’t giving me any face! 

But he didn’t dare to act up. He reflexively looked toward the Mermaid Queen, planning to ask her later on. She would definitely know if he was her man, right?

The Mermaid Queen had been feeling a bit bad that the "foolish guard" hadn’t told her his name, but when she saw the Dragon King suffer the same experience, she grinned.

I feel a bit better somehow...?

“The queen’s husband really is awesome!” Peach said quietly by the Mermaid Queen's ear with an excited expression. “Aiya!”

The Mermaid Queen pinched Peach before looking at the man in the sky with a calm expression, saying, “I still have some things to talk to you about.”

“Oh~” The Ocean race observers couldn't help but quietly heckle. Sure enough, gossip was something no one can resist, no matter whether one's strength was high or low.

Zu An’s expression froze. He didn’t really want to get too involved with the Mermaid Queen, but leaving just like this seemed to be unfavorable for her. There wee some things he did need to talk about, too. As such, he nodded and landed near her.

The Dragon King quickly chased away the other Ocean race experts. “Everything is already settled; go back and take care of the aftermath along the way.”

The Dragon Palace really had endured hardships tonight and was a huge mess. They needed some time to properly fix things. He was also worried that if they stayed behind, they would anger this mysterious expert. That was why he used this excuse to chase them away.

Either way, with the Mermaid Queen here, was there any man who could refuse her? And as long as he asked the Mermaid Queen later, a lot of his confusion would be resolved.

But when he thought about how beautiful the Mermaid Queen was, and how he had chased her for so many years, he couldn't help but feel a bit jealous. 

I hope this mysterious expert goes a bit gentler tonight…

…

As the onlookers left, Zu An was wondering how to sever this karma when the Mermaid Queen suddenly asked, “How are you planning to save the Peacock Princess?”

Translator's Thoughts

chapters.title: Chapter 2427: Plot
chapters.body:
Chapter 2427: Plot

Zu An had been wondering how he was going to talk to the Mermaid Queen without hurting her too much, but he was stunned as soon as he heard what she said. It seemed his imagination had gonea bit too far. 

The Mermaid Queen grinned when she saw his reaction. She'd already guessed what he was going to say before he even spoke. That was why she'd immediately changed the topic to seize the initiative. She'd had way too many men around her over the years, so she was very familiar with this kind of conversation. And while dealing with all of those men, she couldn't offend them, but neither could she let them take advantage of her. If she didn’t have any tricks up her sleeve, how could she survive?

She initially hadn’t wanted to use these kinds of methods, but she knew that if she didn’t do anything, this person would likely completely disappear from her life. She would never be able to see him ever again. She didn’t want that, so she'd decisively chosen to carve open a different path.

If he didn’t want to get too close to her, she would just talk about some other matters. Judging from their earlier interactions, she keenly sensed that he seemed to have been paying special attention to the Peacock Princess.

“Let’s talk inside.” The Mermaid Queen took the chance to invite him in. Her previous palace had been sliced in half by Mojard’s blade, but Peach had already brought the others off to the side to prepare a new place for her.

Zu An did care about the Peacock Princess, and didn’t want to be outside where everyone could see and hear everything. He thus nodded and followed her in.

“Queen’s… Young master, this is some Coral Pearl tea that the queen stored away for many years because she was reluctant to drink it…” Peach offered up a cup of tea to Zu An as if she was presenting a great treasure.

The Mermaid Queen coughed lightly and immediately interrupted her.

This lass really knows how to embarrass others.

Peach stuck out her tongue. When she presented the tea, she stood behind the queen with a big smile.

Zu An didn’t refuse Peach's good intentions and gave the tea a sip. He immediately felt a refreshing sensation, and even the fatigue of rushing all the way here seemed to fade quite a bit. At the same time, the mental exhaustion he felt from fighting that fierce battle and even his vitality were quickly recovering.

“Indeed, this is good tea.” Zu An nodded in praise. “Thank you, queen. Thank you, lady Peach.”

Peach had a huge smile when she heard that. The queen’s husband is praising me!

The Mermaid Queen thought to herself, At least this lass knows my intentions and is trying to rope him in. But she didn’t show it, and instead returned to their earlier topic.

Zu An replied, “A bit earlier, I used my divine sense. The Peacock Princess wasn’t in the Four Way Palace.”

“You should’ve left behind a few of them to interrogate so we would have some ways to find out the Peacock Princess’ whereabouts.” The Mermaid Queen sighed.

Zu An shook his head. “This is something Mojard personally took care of, so his subordinates likely don't know much. Besides, I can roughly guess what Mojard is planning.”

“Oh? What is he planning then?” The Mermaid Queen blinked. The other party seemed to be quite familiar with Mojard. She had no basis for that thought beyond just a feeling, though. After all, it should have been the first time those two met.

Zu An sighed in amazement. It was no wonder why so many powerful individuals had been toyed with by the Mermaid Queen. If she looked at someone with her large, beautiful ,and enchanting eyes and a keen expression, how could an ordinary man refuse any of her requests?

Either way, he hadn’t been thinking of hiding the information anyway, so he said, “I’ve been trying to figure out one thing this entire time. If he came here to form an alliance with the Ocean races, why did he use that other head emissary while hiding this entire time?”

The Mermaid Queen was a bit stunned. She thought about it for a moment before saying, “That’s right… That was a bit strange. The Dragon King was already frightened badly, so even if it was just an ordinary emissary, he would still decide to side with the monsters. There was indeed no need for Mojard to… Hmm. Could it be that he received news that the Fiend races were also trying to form an alliance with the Ocean races, so he concealed himself to find a chance to act?”

“I don’t believe so. If that really had been the reason, the monster emissary wouldn’t have died.” Zu An shook his head. “Besides, the monsters hold the absolute advantage right now. With his status among the monsters, it would have made more sense for him to do all of this with great fanfare. If the Fiend races had known he was present, they wouldn’t have resorted to the path of assassination.”

The Mermaid Queen was smart herself. With that reminder, she suddenly thought of another possibility. “That’s right, hiding quietly among the emissaries is a bit strange. If it wasn’t for the sake of an alliance, was it to target our Ocean races?!”

“That’s right. Judging from my deduction, he didn’t come to form an alliance, but rather the opposite. He came to break up the alliance,” Zu An said gravely.

“But… That can’t be, right?” Even though the Mermaid Queen didn’t feel the slightest bit of goodwill toward the monsters, this suspicion was still largely outside of her estimations. “He shouldn't have any motive to do that. If the Ocean races sided with the monsters, that would only bring them benefits. Why would he want to stop that?”

“I have two guesses.” Zu An raised his finger before explaining, “The first is that there are actually differences in factions even among the monsters. The ones who proposed the alliance might be from the Monster Lord’s camp, while the Incestuous King has never been on good terms with the Monster Lord. Perhaps he didn’t want his rival’s achievements to increase further.”

“What? The Incestuous King and Monster King don’t get along?” The Mermaid Queen was overwhelmed with shock. They really knew too little about the monsters and didn’t have this key piece of information.

But she quickly realized that the monsters were also intelligent beings, so they would have similar weaknesses as any other people. Whether it was the Ocean or Fiend races, they weren’t unanimous in their beliefs. There were too many similar examples.

But why does this man know so many higher-level secrets? Could he also be one of the monsters?

But that shouldn’t be the case. There's no way he could fake that hatred for the monsters. Besides that, Mojard clearly doesn’t know who he is.

Mojard is the third-in-command of the monsters. There's no way he wouldn't be aware of someone as strong as this man in the Monster World.

“Of course, there is a second possibility too.” Zu An paused for a moment before continuing under her astonished expression, “Perhaps the monsters never intended to make you rely on them. They only wished to use an alliance to appease your group before finding some way to exhaust the Ocean races’ power.”

“How could they exhaust our power?” The Mermaid Queen felt that both possibilities seemed likely. However, regardless of which one it was, the monsters were definitely up to no good.

“If it were me…” Zu An thought for a bit before saying, “It would be best if your Ocean races were used to fight against the Fiend races. Not only would the last of the latter’s forces be depleted, your side would also receive great casualties. Then, you would be completely powerless to go against any of the monsters’ orders.”

The Mermaid Queen was a bit confused. “Even though the Dragon King doesn’t have much confidence, he’s definitely not an idiot. He should understand the concept of risking too much. He might continue to give lip service, but he definitely wouldn't truly fight against the Fiend races.”

She'd already come to understand the Dragon King quite well over the years. Even though she didn’t like his way of doing things, she had to admit that he was quite competent.

“He wouldn’t under normal circumstances, but what if Mojard had successfully driven a wedge between the Fiend and Ocean races?” Zu An asked coldly. “For example, by borrowing the hand of the captured Peacock Princess.”

“Are you talking about that evil ritual?” The Mermaid Queen shivered.

“That’s right. I didn't know about the Peacock Princess’ situation at first, but the remaining formation energy I found in the Four Way Palace seemed to be of the brainwashing type,” Zu An said gravely. “But after synthesizing all of the information I collected, I've concluded that Mojard probably used that ceremony to temporarily control the Peacock Princess.

“Think about it. If the Peacock Princess ended up harboring hard feelings due to the alliance request failing, and then caused all manner of trouble for the Ocean races, such as killing a few important figures, what kind of reaction would the Ocean races have?”

Translator's Thoughts

chapters.title: Chapter 2428: Don’T Tell Me You’Re A
chapters.body:
Chapter 2428: Don’T Tell Me You’Re A

“Anger, hatred, and ultimately a complete war with the Fiend races that would not end until the other side was thoroughly crushed.” The Mermaid Queen’s expression changed.

There had never been a shortage of people with bad ulterior motives around her, so that was why she understood human nature extremely well. Not everyone in this world was rational. Many people would be affected by all kinds of emotions and act unreasonably.

At first, perhaps, there would still be some people who knew what was really going on. But if more and more people came to believe that it was the Fiend races doing these things, the few intelligent individuals wouldn’t be able to reverse the situation anymore.

Furthermore, there were many people with ulterior motives who would continue to fan the flames behind the scenes. So if such a thing happened, the Ocean and Fiend races would most likely be swept along by the masses and everything would plummet toward a bottomless abyss.

“Then what should we do now?” the Mermaid Queen asked. “Should we tell the Dragon King so he can prepare for it?”

Zu An shook his head. “People can live as scoundrels for a thousand days, but how can one guard against scoundrels for a thousand days? Besides, the Ocean races' territory is so large, and it’s impossible to protect against everyone. We might even end up triggering the other side's vigilance as a result. What we need to do is to wait. As long as Mojard does something, there will be some traces. We can then track him down to retrieve the Peacock Princess.”

“Alright.” The Mermaid Queen approved of this plan too.

Now that they'd already decided on what to do about the Peacock Princess, however, the room entered a strange silence.

The Mermaid Queen really wanted to ask about where Zu An came from. Even if he didn’t tell her that, it would be good if she could at least see what he really looked like. But she didn’t dare to mention such a thing. Even though she didn’t know what Zu An was worried about, she knew that if she made this request, he would leave her.

She naturally wouldn’t just fall for someone in such a short amount of time, but this was the first time that she had ever been so curious about a man in all these years. There had never been a man who would make her worry so much about their relationship either.

Fortunately, Zu An said, “By the way, I passed by a deep-sea mountain range on my way here, and there seems to be a bottomless marine trench in that area with many Dragon race guards. The defensive formations there seem to be many levels higher than the Dragon Palace’s as well.”

The Mermaid Queen sighed in relief. What she'd been most scared of was that there would be nothing for them to talk about. They could have ended up being completely silent and ultimately part ways. Now that there was something to talk about, she could only answer, “That is our East Sea’s Eye of the Ocean.”

“Eye of the Ocean?” Zu An was surprised. He had heard many legends surrounding the Eye of the Ocean.

In the mythological stories on Earth, there was said to be an Eye of the Ocean in the depths of the sea. When Emperor Yu the Great controlled the floods, he'd used a steel rod that was capable of freely lengthening or shortening, casting it down to suppress the Eye of the Ocean. Later, Sun Wukong looked for a weapon that was suitable for him and ran all the way to the Dragon Palace to cause trouble. In the end, he'd taken the rod as his personal weapon, and it was known as the celebrated Ruyi Jingu Bang[1].

But shouldn’t the abyss of this world be the entrance to the Underworld? Why is it the Eye of the Ocean?

As if seeing through his confusion, the Mermaid Queen explained, “I don’t know what exactly is in the Eye of the Ocean either. That has always been a forbidden area for the Ocean races that no one is allowed to approach.
